title: Rapport Home Helix Bath Towels 2-Pack | Ocean Blue | 70x120cm | 100% Cotton 500gsm | Oeko-Tex Made in Green & BCI Certified
features: Premium Softness & Absorbency: Immerse yourself in the luxurious comfort of 100% pure cotton towels, crafted with a rich 500gsm weight for superior plushness and quick-drying absorbency. Experience spa-level softness that pampers your skin after every bath or shower.

Elegant Helix Design: Transform your bathroom into a space of timeless sophistication with the intricate Helix pattern. Its woven texture adds depth, refinement, and a subtle touch of grandeur to any interior style.

Generous Size & Convenient Pair: Each set includes two generously sized bath towels (70x120cm), designed for full coverage and daily comfort. Perfectly balanced between absorbency and lightweight usability, they wrap you in softness while drying quickly and efficiently.

Sustainable & Safe Choice: Responsibly crafted using Oeko-Tex Made in Green and Better Cotton Initiative (BCI) certified materials, ensuring each towel is ethically produced, free from harmful substances, and gentle on both your skin and the planet.
Vibrant Ocean Blue Color: Refresh your bathroom with the calming allure of the Ocean Blue hue — a serene, nature-inspired tone that harmonizes beautifully with both neutral and modern interiors.
